title: Conditional Formatting on Dashboards
excerpt: I can currently create conditional formatting within the table view of my board; however, when I add a dashboard view and try to pull in the column that was formatted in a table the colors don’t pull in for all columns. …

posts.author: ksmith_brooklynva (Kelly Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
I can currently create conditional formatting within the table view of my board; however, when I add a dashboard view and try to pull in the column that was formatted in a table the colors don’t pull in for all columns. Would like to see if the formatting works correctly on a table and that is what you want to be brought into a view on a dashboard, then it should pull through for all columns requested.

image801×565 27.8 KB

posts.author: kpacheco (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml: Our various teams are also needing this feature to help view priority tasks in the long list of project items when we go through our dashboard as a group-level in team meetings. We would greatly benefit from having this feature implemented!
